html:
Exclusive to:

ColdLukewarmWarmHot

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.

When hot, it does extra damage towards freezing targets.

Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

-

The Heated Garden Hoe is a Tool that can be used to till Farm Soil. It can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Twigs, two uncooked Heat Glands, and three Nitre.

The Heated Garden Hoe can be heated like a Thermal Stone. However, since Hoes always work in one usage, it gains no "power" from being extra hot.

The Heated Garden Hoe passively heats the holder, like a Thermal Stone, and glows when it is warm or hot. However, the holder also directly gains temperature when tilling using the Hoe, which can cause Overheating.

The Heated Garden Hoe does not lose durability from use. Instead, it loses 25% durability when it becomes too cold, needing to be restored to above 60 degree before it can be used again.

The Heated Garden Hoe deals extra damage to freezing targets, up to double damage towards targets not frozen solid, and triple damage against a target that's frozen solid. As usual, striking a frozen-solid target will instantly thaw them out. However, the Heated Garden Hoe's very low base damage means even a frozen target will take less damage than a Tentacle Spike deals.

Trivia

  • The Heated Garden Hoe was called the "Thermic Garden Hoe" during the beta.
  • The Heated Garden Hoe is added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Assets

  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down

Exclusive to:
ColdLukewarmWarmHot
“It's cold and brittle.”
–Wilson
“It's not looking so good...”
–Willow
“Is cracking apart.”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: LOSING STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78
“It may require repairs soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's aboot to break apart.”
–Woodie
“It won't hold together much longer.”
–Maxwell
“It shall nöt weather much further use.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh-oh... is it gonna break?”
–Webber
“It's beginning to crumble.”
–Warly
“Going to break!”
–Wormwood
“It's lookin' a little flimsy.”
–Winona
“The cracks are beginning to show, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It gonna break, florp!”
–Wurt
“Uh oh. Looks like it's about to break...”
–Walter
“Its time is nearly up.”
–Wanda
“I think it's losing steam.”
–Wilson
“Awwwww, where did all that beautiful heat go?”
–Willow
“Is cooled off now.”
–Wolfgang
“It has lost the warmth it once had.”
–Wendy
“HEAT OUTPUT: NEGLIGIBLE”
–WX-78
“Its temperature has diminished significantly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fizzled out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Without heat, it's hardly different from an ordinary garden hoe.”
–Maxwell
“The fire burns löw within it.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, where did the heat go?”
–Webber
“It's getting cold.”
–Warly
“No more warm?”
–Wormwood
“It's coolin' off.”
–Winona
“What's the harm? It's barely warm!”
–Wortox
“Hey! How come not warm anymore?”
–Wurt
“It's barely warm.”
–Walter
“It's barely warm.”
–Wanda
“It's all warmed up!”
–Wilson
“I'm never using any other garden hoe ever again.”
–Willow
“Is good at keeping Wolfgang nice and warm.”
–Wolfgang
“I can find some small comfort in its warmth.”
–Wendy
“A GARDEN HOE AND A HEATER. I RESPECT A MULTITASKER”
–WX-78
“It keeps its user comfortably warm while working.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like wearin' a cozy pair of long johns while I work.”
–Woodie
“If I must do physical labor, I can at least do it in relative comfort.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers respite fröm the cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps us warm while we do our chores.”
–Webber
“It keeps my hands pleasantly warm.”
–Warly
“Warm dirt mover”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' warms you up like some hard work.”
–Winona
“It keeps the cold from taking hold.”
–Wortox
“So warm! Gimme!”
–Wurt
“It'll keep me warm while I'm gardening!”
–Walter
“It makes the work nice and cozy.”
–Wanda
“It's a hot commodity.”
–Wilson
“I like my tools scalding hot.”
–Willow
“Hot garden hoe make Wolfgang feel the burn!”
–Wolfgang
“The hottest flames burn out the quickest...”
–Wendy
“SUPERHEATED FOR MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“It helps perform tasks quickly, if one can withstand the heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's hot, but it gets the job done fast.”
–Woodie
“I despise working up a sweat...”
–Maxwell
“It still bears the heat öf the förge!”
–Wigfrid
“It singes the hairs on our fingies!”
–Webber
“It's a garden hoe, served hot!”
–Warly
“Ah! Hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Anybody got some safety gloves?”
–Winona
“Its heat can't be beat.”
–Wortox
“It good at gardening, but hurt claws!”
–Wurt
“Wow, I can feel the heat from here!”
–Walter
“Incredibly hot, but wonderfully efficient!”
–Wanda

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.
When hot, it does extra damage towards freezing targets.
Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”
-
